upasargachandrika.example_text: 'apasiDya duritaM DattamAyuH' (aTarva॰8.2.7) apasiDya=nirAkftya
'daRqIva yUTAdapaseDasi (nAgam) tvaM yo jetumASaMsasi DarmarAjam' (BA॰vana॰268.5) apaseDasi parARudasi vyAkarozi
'nizkravyAdaM seDa' (tE0 saM0 117) niHseDa nizkfzya bahirapanaya
'tatsarvaM nindayAmAsuryajYavyAseDakAriRaH' (vi0 pu0 1630) vyAseDo viroDo nizeDaH
'yatredamuktamEkAntikatvaM vyAseDadBiH' (yoga sU0 223 ityatra vESAradyAM vAcaspatimiSraH) pratizeDadBirityarTaH
'na cAsmE SrutivipratizidDamucCizwaM dadyAt' (Apa0 Da0 145) vipratizidDaM nizidDam
'vipratizidDaM cAnaDikaraRavAci' (pA0 2413) parasparavirudDaM vipratizidDamiti vfttiH
'harirvipratizeDaM tamAcacakze vicakzaRaH' (SiSu0 26) vipratizeDastulyabalaviroDaH
'kravyAdBya iva BUtAnAmadAnteByaH sadA Bayam tezAM vipratizeDArTaM rAjA sfzwaH svayamBuvA' (BA0 ).. vipratizeDArTaM niyamanAya niyantraRAya
'vipratipUrvAt siDeH karmavyatihAre GaY anyonyapratizeDo vipratizeDaH' (sarasvatI0 12119) nigadavyAKyAtamidaM SrIBojasya vacanam
'tatpramARe vA na sarvapramARavipratizeDaH' (nyA0 sU0 2114) viSezeRa pratizeDo vipratizeDaH vItyayamupasargaH sampratipattyarTe na vyAGAte iti nyAyaBAzyam
AseDo rAjAjYayA'varoDa iti mitAkzarA
'aprAptavyavahAraSca dUto dAnonmuKo vratI vizamasTaSca nAseDyAH' (nAradIya manu0 147) AseDyA vAryA avarodDavyAH AseDaScaturDeti nAradaH-- sTAnAseDaH kAlakftaH pravAsAtkarmaRastaTA
'nyazeDat pAvakAstreRa rAmastad' (Asuramastram) (Bawwi0 1787) nyazeDat apAruRat
'nyazeDi Sezo'pyanuyAyivargaH' (raGu0 24) anugamanAnnivArita ityarTaH
'na kaScana BrAtfzu tezu Sakto nizedDumAsIdanuvartituM vA' (raGu0 1443) nizedDuM virodDuM prativaditum
'nizidDaSatruH' (raGu0 181) nivAritaripurityarTaH
'nizidDo BAzamARastu suvarRaM daRqamarhati' (manu0 8361) nizidDo vAritaH
'aTotseDanizeDO pApavasyasyEvotsiDyE ca nividDyE ca' (jE0 brA0 2143)
'tasmAdutseDaM prajA Baye'BisaMSrayanti' (Sa0 brA0 13229) utseDa unnataBUpradeSo vaprAdiH
'utseDameti BUkozakowasTo'NkurotkaraH' (yo0 vA0 43620) utseDameti UrDvAM gatiM gacCati uccErutizWati
'payoDarotseDaviSIrRasaMhati' (valkalam) (ku0 58) utseDa Onnatyam
'sotseDEH skanDadeSEH' (mudrA0 47) ukto'rTaH
'mAmakasyAsya sEnyasya hatotseDasya saYjaya avaSezaM na jAnAmi…' (BA0 karRa0 993).. utseDa utkarzaH
'vrAtena jIvati' (pA0 5221) atra vfttO nAnAjAtIyA aniyatavfttaya utseDajIvinaH saNDA vrAtA iti sTitam utseDaH SarIram utseDena SarIrAyAsena ye jIvanti ta utseDajIvinaH
'…tvaNmAMsasaMSrayam utseDaM saMhataM SoPaM tamAhuH' (azwANga0 1321-22) utseDaH SoPa ityanarTAntaram
'aTotseDanizeDO pApavasyasyEvotsidDyE ca nizidDyE ca' (jE0 brA0 2143)
'utseDena vE devAH paSUnudaseDan nizeDena paryagfhRan' (paYca0 brA0 15911) utseDa unnatapradeSaH udaseDan apAkramayan
'pratizeDanti rAjAno lubDA mfgamivezuBiH' (BA0 SAM0 289) pratizeDanti nirunDanti niGnantItyarTaH
'iti Satruzu cendriyezu ca pratizidDaprasarezu jAgratO' (raGu0 823) vAritapragatizvityarTaH
'pratizeDatsu cADarmAn hitaM copadiSatsvapi' (manu0 2206) aDarmAnpratizeDatsu mA smA karorityevaM SAsatsu
'viSvedagniH prati rakzAMsi seDati' (f0 82313) dUramutsArayatItyarTaH
'dvizo Gnan pariseDataH' (Bawwi0 988) pariseData AgacCataH sarvato gacCataH
'vArDakzatrirupAseDat pravaRAdiva kuYjaraH' (BA0 droRa0 428) upAseDat avArayat pravaRAt pravaRaM nimnadeSaH taM prApya vArDakzatrirjayadraTaH
